audited_sources.access_requirements: Free historical download path; no login/API key/payment observed for HIST. Real-time feeds require agreements and are not used.
audited_sources.limitations: TOPS is aggregated top-of-book; non-displayed liquidity and individual queue position are not represented; IEX-only venue scope.
audited_sources.name: IEX Exchange Historical Data (HIST)
audited_sources.queue_relevance: DEEP+ sample PCAP is order-by-order displayed depth; DEEP/TOPS are aggregated and cannot identify individual queue position.
audited_sources.terms_summary: Attribution required when distributing/accessing IEX historical data; IEX retains proprietary rights; data is provided as-is, IEX-only, not investment advice.
audited_sources.transformations: gzip decompress in-memory, parse pcapng/IEX-TP/TOPS quote and trade messages, emit summary CSV/JSON

audited_sources.access_requirements: Old public FTP sample notice; current Nasdaq Data Link page requires JavaScript and may require account/subscription for product data.
audited_sources.limitations: 2008 sample notice says files remained through March 31, 2009; current product path may be gated.
audited_sources.name: Nasdaq TotalView-ITCH public sample notice
audited_sources.queue_relevance: Order-level ITCH would be relevant if a lawful sample is confirmed.
audited_sources.terms_summary: Not selected because availability and redistribution path were not clear enough for a no-login reproducible addendum.

audited_sources.access_requirements: Public web page, but browser verification/JavaScript was observed during audit.
audited_sources.limitations: No order book; not enough for the study question.
audited_sources.name: Stooq historical OHLC CSV
audited_sources.queue_relevance: OHLC bars cannot support queue, fill, markout, or order-book policy questions.
audited_sources.terms_summary: Search result states personal use; not selected for repository reproduction.

downloaded_external_files.transformations: gzip decompress in-memory, parse pcapng/IEX-TP/TOPS quote and trade messages, emit report CSV/JSON summaries
